title: Frostbite: The Forever Winter
description: Stranded in an endless Ice Age, you must scavenge resources, build shelter, and battle freezing temperatures just to survive another day. How long can you last?
body:
!["Frostbite: The Forever Winter" Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8db55978a31e5fcc84871408a3320545bf4f736c.png)

### **_Frostbite is a modpack that aims to offer a challenge while adding more mobs and structures to explore. Fight the hunger, thirst and low temperatures to survive another day._**
### 
⚠️I am curruntly remaking the modpack for Neoforge 1.21.1 and the forge version will no longer be updated⚠️
 
![A never ending snow storm everywhere in this world](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e91ab423bfa168f45c37e14bf6a2a81e80dafed8.png)


<details>
<summary>A list of the most important mods "see the full list at the version tab"</summary>

- Aquamirae
- Cold Sweat
- Create and some of its addons
- Dungeons and Taverns
- Dungeons+
- Farmer's Delight
- Nether Dungeons
- Philips Ruins
- Primal
- Primal Winter
- Sophisticated Backpacks
- Supplementaries
- Thirst was Taken
- VS Eureka Mod 
- Valkyrien Skies 2
- Xaero's Minimap
- YUNG's mods
- Yet Another Furniture 

</details>


<details>
<summary>! Desclaimer !</summary>

this is my first ever modpack so expect issues. i still wants to add more contant to the modpack and an ending and a quest book to help in first days.

</details>

If you have any issues or suggestions, make a comment on this modpack's CurseForge page [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/frostbite-the-forever-winter) or the [discord](https://discord.gg/FcjkqZgxR2) server.
